name: product-shaping
description: Take a product from a raw idea to a scaffolded codebase and through the full implementation lifecycle. Includes structured discovery, schema-locked PRDs, agent-friendly tech stack selection, safe bootstrap, brownfield assessment, roadmapping, per-change planning, implementation with verification, and archiving. Worktree-aware: shaping notes live at the main repo root and are shared across all worktrees, and the plugin auto-excludes them from git so they never get committed to a host repo.
